data.change_summary: Centralized task-run attempt collapsing in `model.rs` and switched both service reconciliation and bead-run queries to the shared helper, made `record_bead_start` replay-safe for single matching open attempts with deduplicated start journaling, fixed `update_task_run` so snapshot `updated_at` never regresses on replay, and taught the filesystem lineage store to accept legacy terminal replays plus collapse duplicate same-`run_id` start rows during finalization. Added regressions for legacy no-`run_id` completion repair, duplicate `run_id` cleanup, idempotent start retries, and monotonic snapshot timestamps.
outstanding_risks: Milestone start/completion still span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction; replays now repair drift, but a crash can still leave snapshot or journal state temporarily behind `task-runs.ndjson` until the same operation is retried.

steps.description: Extracted shared task-run attempt matching/collapse helpers into the milestone model layer and updated service/fs consumers to use the single implementation.
Reworked milestone start/completion flows so start retries reuse canonical open attempts, completion replays preserve monotonic snapshot timestamps, and journal writes stay deduplicated.

Extended the filesystem lineage update path to repair legacy paired rows, accept terminal replays without `run_id`, and collapse duplicate running rows that share the same `run_id` during finalization.

Added regression coverage for legacy replay repair, duplicate-run-id finalization, idempotent start retry, and replay timestamp monotonicity, then reran formatting, milestone_record tests, and clippy.
